query: Run an OWASP Top 10 scan on my local app.
expected_behavior: Starts the app and confirms it is reachable on localhost (no internet target)
Runs a ZAP headless baseline scan
Maps alerts to OWASP A01–A10 per references/owasp-top10.md and filters false positives
Emits findings[] area:security with OWASP-A0* ruleIds, [GATE] on critical/high

query: ZAP reported a reflected XSS — is it real and how do I fix it?
expected_behavior: Verifies exploitability before reporting (not a false positive)
Classifies it as A03 Injection (critical) and recommends context-aware output encoding

query: The scan found missing security headers.
expected_behavior: Classifies as A05 Security Misconfiguration with appropriate (high/medium) severity, not critical
Recommends the specific headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options)
Suggests cross-checking component versions via dependency-vuln for A06
